settings.heading: Check compatibility with confidence
settings.copy: Narrow by platform, device, and workflow so you can confirm fit before you buy or install.
settings.support_note: Start broad, narrow the fit, then move into the next clear step only when the match is obvious.

settings.heading: Narrow the fit by platform, device, and workflow
settings.copy: Use the filters below to move from broad compatibility to the exact setup you are checking.
settings.source_note: Start with platform, then device, then workflow. Once the fit is clear, move into downloads, manuals, or direct help.

settings.heading: Take the next clear step
settings.copy: Once fit is confirmed, move straight into the guide, file, or support request you need next.

settings.title: Downloads
settings.copy: Continue to drivers or utilities tied to supported products.

settings.title: Manuals
settings.copy: Continue to setup guides or documentation tied to supported products.

settings.title: Get help now
settings.copy: Start a support request when compatibility still depends on one specific product or deployment detail.

settings.heading: Need help confirming the last detail?
settings.copy: Start one support request when the filters narrow the fit but one important detail is still unclear.
